description_long: A classic hamburger sits on a round white plate with a black rim, accompanied by a serving of golden French fries and a couple of saucy chicken wings. The hamburger features a lightly toasted, sesame seed-topped bun with a wooden skewer piercing through the center for stability. Inside, layers of melted cheese, crisp lettuce, and a thick beef patty are visible, with some shredded cabbage and sauce spilling out from the sides. The fries are arranged in a small pile, while the chicken wings are glazed and slightly charred, adding a touch of color contrast. The plate is clean and simple, emphasizing the hearty, freshly prepared meal. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of a casual urban eatery or food truck.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with cheese, lettuce, and a beef patty is served on a white plate with fries and chicken wings. The meal is visually appealing and typical of a casual urban dining setting.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from the front with fries on the left and the bun's sesame seeds clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the melted cheese, shredded cabbage, and saucy chicken wings on the right side of the plate.
description_view_2: The back of the hamburger is visible, showing more of the shredded cabbage and both fries and chicken wings in the foreground.
description_view_3: The right side of the hamburger is shown, with fries prominently displayed and the chicken wings partially visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Melted cheese is layered over the patty, with shredded lettuce and cabbage spilling out from the sides beneath the top bun. The toppings are unevenly distributed, giving a fresh and casual appearance.
